CustomField.description: Field that used for reports to show the answer for Addendum tracking question.
CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(VIA_HIP_Is_the_content_in_Areas_PK__c) != null, TEXT(VIA_HIP_Is_the_content_in_Areas_PK__c), IF(Is_the_content_in_Therapeutic_Areas__c = true, "Yes", IF(Is_the_content_in_Therapeutic_Areas__c = false, "No","")))
CustomField.label: Is the content in Therapeutic Areas
